name: Dios Exploration Inc.
summary: Dios Exploration Inc. engages in the exploration and evaluation of mineral resource properties in Canada. The company explores for gold and diamond deposits. It holds interests in various projects that cover 624 mining claims in James Bay. The company holds interest in K2, AU 33, Clarkie, 33 Carats and 14K projects located in James Bay, Quebec. The company is based in Montreal, Canada.
